content.en:
The wisdom of the Void Demon Worm was very low, and Ye Tian felt that it should not be difficult to make his Void Demon Worm's copy body a big problem.

In the following years, Ye Tian took the initiative to improve the strength of the Void Demon Worm's copy body.

With his realm, he slightly created some immeasurable magical means suitable for the battle of the Void Demon Insect, which could naturally make the strength of this Void Demon Insect's copy body skyrocket.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to improve the strength of the Void Demon Worm's replication body, and gradually became the leader of a group of Void Demon Worms, taking charge of a group of Void Demon Worms.

Of course, it's just issuing some ordinary orders, and it's nonsense to say how loyal you are.

"You can let the real body copy the body in!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Mia Bitter Sea.

Ye Tian's copy body entered here again, and under the suppression of Mia's bitter sea, his strength could not come out at all.

Of course, he was only using a few Void Demon Worms to sharpen himself.

Whoa!!

A large number of Void Demon Worms appeared, encircling this area and Ye Tian.

This is the batch of Void Demon Worms controlled by Ye Tian.

This is, Ye Tian issued an order to only send a few Void Demon Worms to attack Ye Tian, and the rest of the drama can be done.

These Void Demon Worms naturally listened to the boss's orders, and did not attack Ye Tian's true body to copy his body.

The three Void Demon Worms rushed over and fought with Ye Tian.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian fought with the three Void Demon Insects, and he tried his best, and the three primeval techniques were all displayed.

However, under the current suppression of Mia Kuhai, he couldn't even defeat the three Void Demon Worms, and he was completely suppressed.

"Good, that's the oppression!"

Ye Tian was excited.

He fought frantically with these three Void Demon Worms, and he didn't need any scruples at all.

Moreover, he is a real body replicating the body to fight, and he can feel the changes in his body, this kind of battle is incomparable to the primeval god realm.

The body of the primeval god realm is fake, so even if you fight countless times, you can't break the shackles.

This kind of battle is the real battle!

Soon.

Ye Tian began to get injured, but the injuries caused by the Ancient Technique also made it difficult for the injuries of these three Void Demon Worms to recover.

"The feeling of oppression is not enough!"

Ye Tian ordered a Void Demon Worm to attack his true body copy body.

With the addition of one more Void Demon Insect, Ye Tian's sense of oppression skyrocketed.

In the extreme life-and-death battle, in the end, Ye Tian's replica body fell and died.

"I didn't tear the shackles and continue to let the replica body fight!"

Subsequently, another copy of Ye Tian's body entered the Mia Sea of Bitterness and continued to fight like this.

In this way, Ye Tian's replica body died in battle, and although the bottleneck had not yet been broken, he was more proficient in the use of the three primeval techniques.

A long time had passed, and Ye Tian didn't know how many times he had fought and how many replica bodies he had fallen, but he had a feeling that the bottleneck was about to be broken through by him.

this day.

Another battle broke out.

This time, Ye Tian's opponents were five Void Demon Worms.

Not long after the battle, Ye Tian felt his heart vibrating at a frequency beyond the norm, and the shackles in the dark cracked a little.

Rumble!!!

Some outside energy began to pour into his body, silently refining his heart, which was a sign of a cracked bottleneck.

"Keep fighting!"

Ye Tian let another Void Demon Worm join the battle, and under such a battle, his bottleneck shackles were finally completely broken.

The bottleneck shattered, and the energy around him frantically tempered his heart, causing his heart to begin to transform.

At this time, Ye Tian asked those Void Demon Worms not to attack anymore.

Seeing this, these Void Demon Worms did not attack.

But Ye Tian knew very well that these Void Demon Worms would instinctively attack external creatures, so he couldn't control it for long, and soon these Void Demon Worms would forget his order and launch an attack on his true body.

Sure enough.

Those few Void Demon Worms attacked Ye Tian again, completely forgetting the other commands.

If it takes a long time, other Void Worms will also join the attack.

Many times before, he just fought for too long, and a large number of Void Demon Worms couldn't help it, and wiped him out in an instant.

Soon.

Ye Tian's replica body fell, but his purpose was achieved.

......

Universal City.

Ye Tian's copy body was breaking through, quickly absorbing the energy of the outside world.

Moreover, he also took out a lot of Void Mother Liquid to refine and promote the heart to transform faster.

This metamorphosis lasted for a long time, and eventually prompted the immeasurable blood to usher in the seventh blood transformation.

Once this breakthrough is successful, his strength will be comparable to nine Blood Transformation Realm invincible!

After another long period of time, Ye Tian finally completely stepped into the realm of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm.

"I broke through and reached a realm that Hays Heavenly Ancestor hadn't reached!"

Ye Tian was very excited, with his current strength, he could finally not worry about anything.

Although there are still existences beyond the Nine Blood Transformation Realms in the territorial sea boundary rift, they are all legendary existences of top overlord-level forces, and they are almost the kind that do not come out.

Under normal circumstances, the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor was the top existence of the territorial sea boundary rift.

Like the Ancient Demon Ape Clan and the White Shadow Elephant Clan, in fact, they don't have nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures, and they can still occupy a territory and become a top-notch force-like existence.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian spent another period of time to stabilize the realm, and then he was out of the customs.

"My current strength has been invincible in the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and then I have to show my strength, and by the way, let the human race enter the territorial sea realm!"

Ye Tian decided.

And with his strength, if he wants to show his strength, he must find a target that is not weak, so that he can deter many forces, and other forces will not dare to attack the human race.

And that goal has to be hard enough.

Soon, he chose his goal.

"The Ancient Blood Serpent Clan!"

This race is not really an ancient race, but their patriarch is an ancient race, and the other primeval blood snakes are just blood snakes with primeval blood.

The reason why he occupied the Ancient Blood Snake was because the Ancient Blood Snake Clan had destroyed a territorial sea on the cultivator's side, and even occupied a treasure land of the cultivator's top power, the Sword Dust Sea!

Now, the primeval blood snakes have relocated to the Sword Dust Sea, but no cultivator force dares to retaliate against them.

The location of the Sword Dust Sea is located in an area between Cosmos City and White Elephant City, so it is not far from Cosmos City.

Ye Tian wanted to destroy the primeval blood snake clan and relocate the human race there.
